title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost and speed. He argues that the Codex versus Claude Code framing is misleading and emphasizes that the actual choice should focus on a different underlying factor that matters more than the tool selection itself.
